attempts.text:
Coconut kisses,
Chewy clouds of sweet delight,
Joy in every bite.
Happy #NationalMacaroonDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Coconut clouds rise,
Chocolate hugs the tender,
Sweet joy in each bite.
Happy #NationalMacaroonDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Crisp shells, sweet and bright,
Coconut dreams take their flight,
Joy in every bite.
Happy #NationalMacaroonDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Coconut delights,
Soft and sweet with each bite,
Joyful crunches sing.
Happy #NationalMacaroonDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Coconut and cream,
Soft shells in pastel hues,
Sweet bites of pure joy.
Happy #NationalMacaroonDay from @ClamBakeSanta
